content:
## Task: Agent-VM Backend Service

Create a REST streaming server at /Users/mastercontrol/.openclaw/workspace/agent-vm that manages isolated VM sandboxes with OpenCode.

### Project Location
/Users/mastercontrol/.openclaw/workspace/agent-vm

### Architecture
- Uses @vercel/sandbox for isolated VMs
- Runs opencode serve inside each sandbox (port 4096)
- Hono framework for REST API
- SSE streaming for real-time responses

### Implementation Tasks

1. Setup
   - Run npm install in project directory
   - Create .env.example with required env vars
   - Test with npm run dev

2. Session Routes
   - POST /sessions - create sandbox, start opencode
   - GET /sessions - list sessions
   - DELETE /sessions/:id - stop sandbox

3. Chat Routes
   - POST /sessions/:id/chat with SSE streaming

### Files Already Created
- README.md (full architecture docs)
- src/index.ts (Hono server)
- src/routes/*.ts (session, chat, health)
- src/services/*.ts (sandbox, opencode, session-store)
- package.json, tsconfig.json

@opencode implement this project end-to-end. Start with npm install.
